title: Copy Item Name and Link

posts.author: jhunt (Josh Hunt)
posts.cookedHtml:
REQUEST: Right click item > “Copy Item Name and Link”

The item name, followed by a tab character, followed by the link is copied to the clipboard…

I prefer a tab to separate the name and link because it is more flexible with pasting into spreadsheets.

USE CASE: Many times a day, I copy the name and the link to send in a message. I do this to direct people to the exact item so confusion is minimized.
